The '''[[Krath/Legends|Krath]] war blade''' was a weapon created through the use of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. These blades were used during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]].

Other Krath weaponry include the [[Krath blood blade|blood blade]], the [[Krath dire sword|dire sword]], and the [[Krath Double Sword|double sword]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
